alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.show: Alexis Gideon Video Musics II Sun Wu Kong
alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.episode: Alexis Gideon Video Musics II Sun Wu-Kong.ia.mp4
alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.desc: "Video Musics II: Sun Wu-Kong" is a one hour multimedia video opera based on the 16th century Chinese novel "The Journey to the West". The project combines line drawing and watercolor animation as well as stop motion and claymation. It has musical contributions from Rachel Blumberg (M Ward, Arch Cape), Cory Gray (Norfolk & Western, Carcrashlander), Shelley Short (Hush) as well as visual contributions from Cynthia Star (Coraline, Moral Orel, Robot Chicken), Becca Taylor (Punk Planet, Arthur) and Ezra Claytan Daniels (Black Violet, The Changers). The DVD/Vinyl release is on Africantape(EU) / Slowtrain(US) scheduled for fall 2010.
